name: Meteor Effect
description: Animated meteors/shooting stars that streak across a card or section, adding a cosmic and dynamic visual effect.
whenToUse: Use for feature cards, pricing cards, or hero sections where you want animated shooting star trails in the background.

props.name: number
props.description: Number of meteor elements to render

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the meteors container
